name: TGV SRAAC erstwhile Sree Rayalseema Alkali

posts.author: Prabhat_Mohanty
posts.community: TGV SRAAC erstwhile Sree Rayalseema Alkali
posts.text: Result is out.QoQ volume almost same.However considering higher depreciation, yearly EPS is affected by 4.5. So without this, EPS would have been more than 16. Considering higher capacity, solar power addition, uptick in caustic soda prices, prevailing price appears to be cheap. Make your own assessment before taking buy/sell decision.

posts.author: lohiyaakshay08
posts.community: TGV SRAAC erstwhile Sree Rayalseema Alkali
posts.text: Caustic soda prices are likely to see year-on-year surge in Q2 FY27, driven by a convergence of structural supply deficits and recovering demand from the alumina, textile, and paper industries. While current prices remain range-bound — as buyers tend to defer purchases during price rises, particularly amid geopolitical uncertainty — the underlying market remains tight on account of supply-side pressures, including the West Asia crisis, elevated energy costs (a key input in this industry), and the permanent capacity shutdowns in Europe last year. The year-on-year comparison will appear especial…
